name: Never Kiss Your Best Friend Lockdown Special
original_name: Never Kiss Your Best Friend Lockdown Special
overview: Tanie is in distress after her breakup with Sumer. Her social media followers too drop drastically. To get her popularity back on track, Tanie fakes a relationship with Zayed, the first guy she kissed. But will the fake love transform into something special? Find out in Never Kiss Your Best Friend - Lockdown Special, a ZEE5 original series starring Anya Singh, Zain Imam, Jaaved Jaaferi, Niki Walia, Anup Soni, and Juhi Babbar.
